title: hiraea sclerophylla
intro: Hiraea sclerophylla, also known as the New Zealand hiraea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to New Zealand, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hiraea sclerophylla include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and fight off infections. Hiraea sclerophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it is also used in traditional Maori medicine to treat various ailments.
